column_description: the zip code of the postal point
the city where the postal point locates
the state of the city
whether the country that the city belongs to is multi_country
value_description: commonsense evidence: The meaning of multi_country is consisting of or involving multiple countries.

column_description: the type of the postal point
the organization to which the postal point belongs
value_description: commonsense evidence: 'No data' means the postal point is not affiliated with any organization

column_description: the time zone of the postal point location
whether the location implements daylight savings
value_description: commonsense evidence: Daylight saving is the practice of advancing clocks (typically by one hour) during warmer months so that darkness falls at a later clock time. As a result, there is one 23-hour day in late winter or early spring and one 25-hour day in autumn.

column_description: the latitude of the postal point location
the longitude of the postal point location
the elevation of the postal point location
state-level FIPS code
country-level FIPS code
value_description: commonsense evidence: FIPS codes are numbers that uniquely identify geographic areas. The number of digits in FIPS codes varies depending on the level of geography.

column_description: the region where the postal point locates
the division of the organization
the population of the residential area in 2020
value_description: commonsense evidence: 'No data' means that the postal point is not affiliated with any organization. Or the organization has no division.

the population of Hawaiian people in the residential area
the population of other races in the residential area

the population of females in the residential area
the median age of the residential area
value_description: commonsense evidence: gender ratio in the residential area = male_population / female_population if female_population != 0

column_description: the male median age in the residential area
the female median age in the residential area

the total wages reported in the annual payroll report of the residential area
the number of employees in the residential area
value_description: commonsense evidence: Employers must submit periodic payroll reports to the Internal Revenue Service and state taxing authority. The report is used by employers to report wage information.

column_description: the water area of the residential area
the land area of the residential area
the number of single-family delivery units in the residential area
the number of single-family delivery units in the residential area
value_description: commonsense evidence: A single-family unit can be described as a single unit that accommodates only one family or tenant at a time on rent.

column_description: the total number of beneficiaries of the postal service
value_description: commonsense evidence: multi-family units are usually under a greater surface area with the capacity to accommodate more than one tenant or multiple families on rent at the same time
